D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\linter_unit_tests.dir/objects.a
"D:\CPP DK\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\linter_unit_tests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\linter_unit_tests.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\CPP DK\bin\g++.exe" -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\linter_unit_tests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o linter_unit_tests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblinter_unit_tests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\linter_unit_tests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
